label: Stonecutting

description: Store electricity in batteries.

description: Produce medicine from herbal ingredients.

label: Microelectronics
description: Build advanced electronic devices.

label: Gun Turrets
description: Build automated gun turrets for defense.

label: Fabrication
description: Fabricate advanced components and parts.

label: Geothermal Power
description: Tap into geothermal vents for reliable power.

label: Hospital Beds
description: Construct specialized beds for faster patient recovery.

label: Vitals Monitor
description: Monitor patient vital signs for improved treatment.

label: Flak Armor
description: Produce ballistic armor for colonist protection.

label: Long-Range Mineral Scanner
description: Scan for distant mineral deposits.

label: Devilstrand
description: Cultivate Devilstrand mushrooms for strong textiles.

label: Solar Panels
description: Generate power from sunlight.

label: Passive Cooler
description: Cool rooms without electricity using evaporative cooling.

label: Brewing
description: Brew beer from hops for colonist recreation.

label: Air Conditioning
description: Cool or heat rooms with powered climate control.

label: Carpeting
description: Produce soft carpet floors for improved comfort and beauty.

label: Transport Pods
description: Launch colonists and supplies across the map.

label: Multi-Analyzer
description: Construct a multi-analyzer for advanced research.

label: Ship Basics
description: Understand the fundamental principles of starship construction.

label: Ship Engine
description: Build a Johnson-Tanaka drive for interstellar travel.

label: Ship Sensor Cluster
description: Build sensor arrays for deep-space navigation.

label: Ship Cryptosleep Casket
description: Build cryptosleep caskets for long-duration space travel.

label: Ship Reactor
description: Build a fusion reactor to power the starship.

label: Advanced Fabrication
description: Manufacture advanced components and mechanoid parts.

label: Charged Shot
description: Build weapons using charged shot technology.

label: Bionics
description: Construct advanced bionic prosthetics.

label: Archeotech Study
description: An endless pursuit of ancient technology secrets. Can be researched repeatedly.
